architectReview.evidence: Post-blocker architect re-review confirmed default-export audit coverage, FIFO non-overlap evidence, repository-bound benchmark artifacts, public compatibility, and no retained unsafe optimization.

executorQa.evidence: Executor QA matrix covered strict audit failures, tool/schema/catalog/FIFO contracts, benchmark identity and resource handling, fail-closed errors, public mutation gates, and candidate rollback. Leader ran the real API/package/build surfaces.

artifactRefs.description: Final build, full test, strict JSDoc, cleaner, architect, and red-team evidence.
Repository-bound six-scenario benchmark baseline with raw samples and FIFO correctness.
Public export, tool, registration, and package migration analysis with breaking changes blocked.

contractCoverage.contractRef: Strict JSDoc and shared target-map contract
contractCoverage.obligation: Discover MCP automatically and fail closed for missing headers/exports/default exports/re-exports/internals/exemptions/targets while preserving legacy skills checks.
Preserve ordered tools, exact schemas, shared session, FIFO, errors, registrations, build and package behavior.
Produce reproducible benchmark evidence and roll back candidates that violate manifests or thresholds.
Inventory public surfaces without making a breaking mutation.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: npm run mcp:jsdoc:check && npm run jsdoc:check
npm run build && npm run ci
Source/export/tool/registration/package inventory generation and contract hashing

adversarialCases.scenario: Unknown, missing, or empty canonical target
Missing/misplaced default export docs and invalid/export exemptions
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Fail closed with stable audit code

adversarialCases.scenario: Tool order or input schema changes
Callbacks start concurrently while preserving submission order
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: maxActive assertion fails unless concurrency remains one

adversarialCases.scenario: Invalid schema or unsupported provider action
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Structured invalid/refused signal, no raw throw

adversarialCases.scenario: Fast candidate changes exported function source signature
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Stronger manifest gate rejects and rolls back candidate

adversarialCases.scenario: Public export/tool/schema/package deletion proposed without migration approval

iteration.evidence: AI SLOP CLEANUP REPORT PASS: final changed files contained no masking fallback, dead manual framing, untested default-export gap, FIFO proof gap, or stale accepted-candidate claim. Architect and executor QA reran after fixes and returned no blockers.
